hero.title: Premium Moroccan Citrus Export
hero.subtitle: Fresh Oranges, Lemons, Clementines and Mandarins exported from Morocco to international markets.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Delivering premium Moroccan citrus to the world since 2010
about.description: Atlas Citrus Export is a leading Moroccan citrus export company specializing in premium quality oranges, lemons, clementines and mandarins. Rooted in the fertile lands of Morocco, we combine traditional farming expertise with modern agricultural practices to deliver the freshest citrus fruits to international markets.
about.description2: Our commitment to sustainable agriculture, rigorous quality control, and reliable logistics has made us a trusted partner for buyers across Europe, the Middle East, and beyond.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ordering
faq.q1: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.a1: For orders within Morocco, the minimum quantity is 500 KG. For international orders, the minimum is 1000 KG. Container loads are also available upon request.
faq.q2: Which countries do you deliver to?
faq.a2: We export to countries across Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, and other regions. Contact us for specific country availability and shipping details.
faq.q3: What export documents do you provide?
faq.a3: We provide all necessary export documentation including phytosanitary certificates, certificates of origin, commercial invoices, packing lists, and bill of lading.
faq.a4: Shipping times vary by destination. European deliveries typically take 3-7 days, Middle East 5-10 days, and other destinations 10-21 days.
faq.a5: We offer various packaging options including standard export cartons, branded packaging, retail-ready packs, and bulk containers. Custom packaging is available on request.
